Product Name: Light Through the Clouds
Description: Light Through the Clouds captures the quiet moment when the sky opens — light pouring through a break in the clouds over a still Maine bay at dusk. Original oil painting on canvas, signed on the back. Painted in my Scarborough, Maine studio. Ships flat and carefully wrapped from Maine within 5–7 business days. Local pickup available in the Scarborough / Portland area. Each original is one of a kind — once it is gone, it is gone. Commissions in a similar style are available; message me to start one.
Story: The quiet moment when the sky opens — light pouring through a break in the clouds over the bay, painted from a still evening on the Maine coast.

Product Name: Harbor Line- Oil Painting Canvas Print-Cape Breeze
Description:
This bright coastal scene captures a sailboat gliding through calm blue water, its crisp white sail catching the light against a clear sky. In the distance, a charming lighthouse and shoreline buildings add warmth and character, creating a sense of place and quiet seaside charm.
Clean lines and expressive brushstrokes give the composition both structure and movement. The contrast between the vivid blues and sunlit architectural details creates a fresh, breezy atmosphere that feels distinctly summery and serene.
This piece evokes the simple pleasure of a peaceful harbor day — salt air, open water, and the gentle pull of the wind. It brings a light, coastal elegance to any space, perfect for beach homes, nautical décor, or anyone who loves the calm beauty of life by the sea.

Product Name: The Sea Forgot the Rules- Oil Painting Canvas Print- Lobster Lines, Maine
Description:
This fine art print captures a close-up glimpse of Maine’s working waterfront, where weathered lobster buoys hang in soft coastal light beside a quiet harbor shed. Sunlit fields and distant water peek through in the background, grounding the scene in the unmistakable landscape of coastal Maine.
Bold, painterly brushstrokes and layered color give the composition warmth and movement. The bright reds, blues, and whites of the buoys stand out against muted wood tones and sandy paths, creating a balance between vibrant detail and rustic simplicity.
Inspired by the everyday beauty of life along the Maine coast, this piece reflects the heritage, rhythm, and authenticity of New England’s fishing communities. It brings coastal character and relaxed maritime charm into any space, perfect for beach homes, nautical interiors, or anyone who loves Maine’s shoreline traditions.
